EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to use clipboard to transfer data from the application {datafield7} to the application {datafield8}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} used clipboard to transfer data from the application {datafield7} to the application {datafield8} in violation of the policies: {datafield6}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} used clipboard to transfer data from the application {datafield7} to the application {datafield8}
The user {subject.name} from host {src.host} failed to use clipboard to transfer data from the application {datafield7} to the application {datafield8} due to the policies: {datafield6}
